name: Chem Wars
author: @phaldaros
description: A Drug Wars-style trading game set in the Mojave. You lost a shipment belonging to the Omertas and have 30 days to raise 50,000 caps before they collect your kneecaps. Buy low, sell high across six locations while dodging Officer NARC-9, one of Mr. House's police Securitrons on chem-interdiction patrol, along with other wasteland woes.
